data.name: Futanari Affairs 🍆
data.detailed_description:
Emily is young, beautiful and very sexy. She finds herself in enthralled by the seductive gaze of Angel, a woman who likes to take control, and who has more to offer Emily than any man ever could. Her innocent gaze dipping lower, Emily finally sees what’s really in store for her! All shyness aside, she knows now this is what she really wanted all along.

Key Features

• Visual Novel about the sexual adventures of two hotties who met on a dating app

• Exciting porn story written by a nymphomaniac woman

• Full HD (1920x1080 pixels) resolution graphics

• Animated and 100% uncensored sex scenes of Girl fucked by Futanari

• Girl's and Futa's hot moans and the environmental ambiance sounds

• 17 minutes of animation with music and sounds that can be re-watched

• Name your characters to make this story your personal one

WISHLIST & FOLLOW FOR UPDATES!

Upcoming updates:

• LOVENSE sex toys support for unforgettable pleasure & satisfaction

• Translation into other languages ​​upon your requests, post your wishes on the game hub!

data.short_description: Sexy Emily has been seduced by gorgeous Angel’s alluring eyes. She’s nervous, she’s never done this before. But she’s so ready to take it all in! And as she turns her head to take in Angel’s seductive gaze, her eyes drop lower and see the true reward for her submission!
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: Pentium® 4 1.5 GHz / Athlon®
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GPU capable of showing images and video
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® 9 compatible

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: Apple M1 or Intel Core M
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GPU capable of showing images and video
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® 9 compatible

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
